rationale: The cited paper appears in the citing article only as part of a grouped literature list supporting the general claim that marketing-based expectancies have been studied across domains. The citing authors do not single out Wansink and Chandon (2006) for its specific mechanisms, findings, or policy implications, and they do not use it directly in hypothesis development, measurement choices, or result interpretation. Its role is broad background context rather than a distinct intellectual building block in this paper.
